purpose: Portable checked-in H5G corpus and bakeoff evidence for recipe selection, rigging decisions, proposal reports, and claim boundaries without requiring the full H5G research workspace.

families.title: HP Symbol
role_motion_expectations: breathe loop where layered character parts exist
known_gaps: proof scaffold is not a final production HP template
bakeoff gaps include slot_attachment, scale, rotate, translate, slot_color, and deform

families.title: LP Symbol / General Symbols
known_gaps: needs broader one-click thumbnail/source-body coverage
bakeoff gaps include slot_attachment, scale, rotate, translate, and slot_color

families.title: MP Symbol
known_gaps: no promoted full-corpus recipe category/count row yet
needs production MP intensity validation against game art

families.title: BO / Special Symbol
role_motion_expectations: legacy BO-special/wild/special overlap must be disambiguated
known_gaps: split legacy BO-special coverage from modern bonus/special-feature roles when production needs differ

families.title: Wild Symbol
known_gaps: no promoted full-corpus recipe category/count row yet
needs dedicated corpus recipe promotion and thumbnails

families.title: Special Feature Symbol
known_gaps: no promoted full-corpus recipe category/count row yet
needs dedicated special-feature corpus rows

families.title: Bonus Symbol
known_gaps: keep BO bonus trigger behavior separate from BL row-blocker UI/gameplay assets

families.title: Jackpot Symbol
known_gaps: broaden source-body coverage beyond current thumbnail-backed one-click rows

families.title: Value Symbol / WYS
known_gaps: confirm WYS/WY naming and text/value layer requirements with production assets
bakeoff gaps include slot_color, slot_attachment, translate, rotate, scale, and slot_twoColor

families.title: Scatter Symbol
known_gaps: human reference evidence exists but bakeoff selected no generated candidate in the full run
needs more corpus/source-body evidence

families.title: WinFrame / Explode
known_gaps: not production full-frame compositing
needs production frame/VFX layering, masking, and compositing rules

families.title: Meter
known_gaps: production meter state, fill-mask, tier layout, reset, and loop contracts remain undefined

families.title: Transition
known_gaps: production screen layout, masks, camera motion, and feature-state integration remain undefined

families.title: Celebration
known_gaps: production celebration layout, masking, tier-value overlays, and stop/loop contracts remain undefined

families.title: Avatar
role_motion_expectations: game runtime owns persistent state and event consumption
known_gaps: not a production character rig or full runtime state machine
large avatar bakeoff missing deltas include slot_attachment, slot_color, scale, translate, rotate, draw_order, and deform references

review_gated_families.reason: Known BL row-blocker UI/gameplay rows exist, but no deterministic row-lock/break/unlock/reveal compiler contract exists.
Unresolved assets must be classified by visual/gameplay purpose or left outside the symbol compiler scope.

role_to_motion.background: root/static anchor unless a reviewed parallax template exists
role_to_motion.character_body: idle breathe, land settle, win lift or pulse; mesh candidate when bending is needed
role_to_motion.head: body-follow with bob, expression swaps, blink/laugh overlays
role_to_motion.left_hand/right_hand/arm: secondary wave or bounce follow-through; IK remains opt-in/reviewed
role_to_motion.sheen/text/value_ball: text sheen or value pop with minimal readability-safe motion
role_to_motion.sparkle/additive_effect: short sparkle or VFX burst; avoid production blend-mode claims

layer_guidance: Use semantic parent hints for body/head/arm/frame/text instead of flattening everything under one rig bone.
Surface low-confidence and symbol-level-only sidecar matches for animator review.
Map effect layers to shimmer/text_sheen/frame_pulse/sparkle actions when the family supports them.

ui_system_buckets.boundary: Supported UI/system buckets produce proof templates and validation reports only; broad UI/background ambience and row blockers remain review-only.

findings: Mesh topology, weights, prune settings, and extreme-pose behavior require rigger review.
First-pass auto-bound weighted meshes are useful review artifacts but are not Spine Auto parity or final weight painting.
Deform timelines are not implemented and should stay sparse/reviewed when future cases require them.
No production mesh topology generation, linked mesh inheritance, or production deform authoring is approved.

production_export_runtime_boundaries: Browser runtime preview proof is representative Spine Player acceptance, not target game runtime approval.
Native .spine creation is allowed only through Spine's official CLI import path when explicitly requested.
Production .skel export automation, license activation, Perforce submission, and source-art writes are blocked.
Manual production export remains gated by approved versions, license posture, browser-runtime evidence with hashes, target runtime acceptance, and art approval.
known_gaps: Proof-ready means deterministic proof compilation and smoke validation exist; it does not mean production-ready animation.
Full bakeoff reruns are H5G-internal optional validation, not a dependency for Chris's core family/rigging guidance.
Exact local motion profile refresh is still needed after some compiler improvements.
Row blockers, broad background/UI ambience, generic VFX-only buckets, and unknown UI/system assets remain review-only.
Avatar runtime state, listener consumption, final acting, mesh topology, final weights, deform keys, and production export remain gated.
